name: Shrimp with Feta in Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Large shrimp, shelled and peeled
1 pound Tomatoes - peeled and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour lemon juice over cleaned shrimp in a bowl and set aside.
2. In a skillet, saute onions, garlic, celery, parsley, and chopped tomatoes in olive oil until onions and celery are tender. Reduce heat and simmer for about 20 minutes. Add clam juice, cook for another 5 minutes, then remove from heat. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
3. In another pan, saute shrimp in butter until they turn pink. Pour the tomato mixture into the bottom of a casserole dish. Place the whole peeled tomato in the center and surround it with shrimp. Sprinkle oregano over the entire casserole. Pour white wine around the shrimp and sprinkle feta cheese over them and into the tomato center.
4. Bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes or until the feta melts. To serve, carefully remove shrimp with a spatula so that the melted feta stays intact. Quarter the tomato and serve as a garnish.
